get.summary: SSE live status for the caller’s own packages (§16.1)
SSE live status for the full operational pool

200.description: Active bundle, or null if none

post.summary: Begin handling a package (assigned → in_progress, case.started)
Report a problem on an owned case (→ issue_open, issue.created)

get.summary: §10.3 Mitarbeitenden-Board for the day (assigned bundles per employee)
§10.1 Day capacity tile (net / planned / reserve / utilisation)
§10.1 Day ZST KPIs (computed from ZstRecord + case statuses)

parameters.name: eventType
parameters.description: Comma-separated WorkflowEventType allowlist, e.g. "assignment.overridden,case.prioritized,case.parked,case.ready". When set, only events whose eventType is in the list are returned.

get.summary: §10.4 Belegdetails: one case with positions, boxes, documents, history

post.summary: Zur Planung freigeben: approve a reviewed case (needs_review → ready).
Rest reaktivieren: put a part-finished remainder back to work (partially_completed → ready).
Priorität entfernen: drop the manual teamlead priority (case.deprioritized).
Storno: cancel a case (→ cancelled, case.cancelled). Reasoned + audited.
Problem freigeben: resolve a case open issue (issue_open -> in_progress)
Recalculate the day assignment (§8.3 "Neu berechnen"). Deterministic, < 5 s.
§E.4 Simulation/Vorschau: run the engine over the ready pool WITHOUT persisting (no bundles, no events).
Tagesabschluss (§15.1): export all completed cases (→ zst_done, zst.exported) as a ZST CSV.
§8.4 Withdraw a case from a bundle → case back to ready (409 if already started).
§8.4 Add a ready case to a bundle → case assigned.
§8.4 Reorder a bundle's cases (and its route stops follow).

put.summary: §11.2 Replace the location master: upsert by code, soft-deactivate omitted rows, 409 if a referenced location is removed.

get.summary: List employees with today’s shift, capacity and absence.
Employee detail incl. weekly pattern and recent audit.

patch.summary: Update profile (active, area tags, productivity, overtime, pattern).

info.title: Paketlagerdispo Backend API
info.description: Digitale Belegverteilung – modular monolith backbone. Status state machine (§7), RBAC (§5/§16.1), audit event log (§7.2), and the case pool/lifecycle (§14.2).

assignedEmployeeName.description: Display name of the assigned employee

nosFlag.description: NOS (Never Out of Stock) article flag

pointNo.description: Printed point number (1,4,5,6,8,9,10,11); null for variants

instructionPoints.description: Ordered Arbeitsanweisung points (derived from header + positions)

eventId.description: Audit event id, if a milestone was recorded

caseId.description: Case the issue is reported against

countsByStatus.description: Open case count grouped by status

oldestOpenBookingDate.description: Booking date of oldest open case

deliveryGroupId.description: Delivery-group id (Teamlead-Anforderung Punkt 1); null if standalone

deliveryGroupSize.description: Number of Belege in this Beleg's delivery group (1 = standalone)

assignedEmployeeName.description: Display name of the assigned employee

expectedQuantity.description: Σ expected over the position SKU lines

confirmedQuantity.description: Σ confirmed over the SKU lines, null if none confirmed yet

completedQuantity.description: Confirmed quantity booked by this ZST

completedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the ZST was set

exportedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the ZST batch was exported (zst_done), else null

reason.description: Reason logged in the case.cancelled audit event

durationMs.description: Wall-clock of the engine run (Anhang E.5 budget < 5000ms).

date.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD the export ran

exportedCount.description: Number of cases moved completed → zst_done

csv.description: RFC 4180 CSV of the exported ZST rows

caseId.description: Case to withdraw from the bundle

reason.description: Reason logged in the §8.4 audit event

caseId.description: The case touched by this mutation, with its new status

caseStatus.description: CaseStatus of the touched case, if any

caseId.description: Ready case to add to the bundle

reason.description: Reason logged in the §8.4 audit event

caseIds.description: Permutation of the bundle's current case ids

reason.description: Reason logged in the §8.4 audit event
Reason logged in the §8.4 audit event

id.description: Server id; omit/ignore for new rows

leadDays.description: Vorlauf in Tagen vor dem Verladetag

overdueLeadDays.description: Default Vorlauf (Tage) vor dem Verladetag bis Überfälligkeit

maxWeBelegGap.description: Max numeric gap between consecutive weBelegNo (1 = strict run)

netCapacityToday.description: Net capacity counted today (0 if inactive/frei)
Net capacity counted today (0 if inactive/frei)
